title: Resume Tailoring Agent
oneliner: Paste a job description. Get a tailored resume.
description: A multi-agent system that reads a job description, figures out what the role is actually looking for, and rewrites your resume to match. Four agents working in sequence: one analyses the JD, one rewrites, one drafts the cover letter, one reviews the output before anything lands in your hands.

title: Cricket Score Bot
description: A cron job that checks live cricket data every 15 minutes, compares it against a local SQLite snapshot, and sends a notification only when something actually changed. Built because I got tired of refreshing the browser mid-match.

title: Flick Finder
oneliner: Search a movie. Get what you need.
description: A movie search app built on the TMDB API. Type a title and you get the rating, genre, cast and a short synopsis. Nothing more. I built it because most movie apps bury the info you actually want.
